title: Zero Concept Architecture
content:
# Trust is a Vulnerability

Zero Trust is a security framework based on the principle of 'Never Trust, Always Verify'. It assumes that the network is always compromised and that threats can come from anywhere.

## Core Tenets
- **Continuous Verification:** Authenticate and authorize every access request continuously.
- **Least Privilege:** Limit user access with Just-In-Time (JIT) and Just-Enough-Administration (JEA).
- **Assume Breach:** Minimize blast radius and segment access.

## Implementation in Sentinel
Our Sentinel engine implements Zero Trust by:
- Monitoring endpoint posture every 60 seconds.
- Enforcing policy pack rules on every command route.
- Requiring two-person rule for sensitive policy changes (when enabled).
